original: This tattered cloak should never be confused for a product of the leading weapons manufacturer, Reaper Armaments. Rather, it appears to be a garment of ancient terran make and design. The material is scratchy and old. More than one moth has had a chance to carve its own hole through it. Nevertheless, the tarnished silver clasp remains in good condition, decorated to resemble a farmer’s scythe.\n\nThough it offers no protection against the cold, you feel deadlier just holding it, let alone donning it. Truly, this reminds you of the legendary Grim Reaper.
